diagram_title: Generic Branch Repo MCP CICD — Functional Context

activities.title: Resolve Project Context
activities.description: Infer or validate repo root, base branch, branch naming policy, beta worktree policy, and runtime launcher policy.

activities.title: Prepare Feature Loop
activities.description: Create or reuse a feature branch and attach the beta worktree from cms.

activities.title: Validate Feature Runtime
activities.description: Switch the main worktree to the feature branch and launch the web runtime for manual verification.

activities.title: Finalize Feature Branch
activities.description: Merge the verified feature branch back into cms and perform guarded cleanup.

arrows.label: Merged Base Branch And Cleanup Report
